title: SOC 2 CC7.4 — Cisco ISE Adaptive Network Control Containment Audit

compliance.assurance_rationale: SOC 2 TSC CC7.4 — incident response. UC-17.1.42 evidences continuous audit of all ISE ANC actions (quarantine, unquarantine, port-bounce, port-shutdown).
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that automated ISE ANC containment actions are logged with full attribution and that excessive quarantine activity (potential abuse or false-positive cascade) is detected.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.8.40' archiving ANC action events to `audit_evidence` with `soc2_clause=CC7.4`.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (86001, 86002, 86003) earliest=-1d
| stats count, dc(endpoint_mac) as endpoints by anc_action, anc_policy, initiator
| eval soc2_clause="CC7.4", control="Incident_Response_Audit"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence SOC 2 CC7.4 — ANC containment audit covering all automated incident response actions.
value: SOC 2 auditors will request continuous evidence of incident response. ANC action audit (with attribution showing whether action was SOAR-driven, manual-admin, or pxGrid-publisher driven) is the audit-quality artefact.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for HIPAA Security Rule evidence.
visualization: SOC 2 CC7.4 panel: ANC action timeline; per-policy ANC action count.

references.title: UC-17.1.42 — ANC Action Auditing and Excessive Quarantine Detection

knownFalsePositives: 1. SOAR playbook test runs — annotate with playbook test ID.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.42 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.8.40: SOC 2 CC7.4 — ANC Audit Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.8.40,reg=SOC2,clause=CC7.4
```

Quarterly review with SOC 2 service auditor; annual evidence pack for Type II report.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence SOC 2 CC7.4 — ANC containment audit covering all automated incident response actions. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.

controlTest.positiveScenario: ANC quarantine fires. Evidence captured with attribution.

evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with SOC 2 CC7.4 tagging.
exclusions: Test playbook runs excluded via `initiator` filter.
